examples: A recent Gallup poll suggests that no political group is likely to win an outright majority in the next Salvadoran parliament.
One Gallup poll found that 20 percent of Americans, who have been unemployed for at least a year report having depression, double the rate for working Americans.
CID-Gallup placed Mr Lewites third, with 15% of the vote, behind Mr Ortega with 23%.
The Time and Gallup polls surveyed likely voters (likely in the opinion of pollsters).
